title: Initial export-control policy bulletin
text_excerpt: New controls affect advanced semiconductor equipment, AI chips, design software, and restricted end users.
summary: Initial local evidence note establishing the decision problem and immediate compliance uncertainty.
freshness_note: Demo evidence representing the first project question.

title: Follow-up licensing clarification
text_excerpt: Clarification identifies narrower restrictions, a licensing path, and a transition period for some previously authorized orders.
summary: Follow-up local evidence note used to demonstrate how project decisions can change or stabilize over time.
freshness_note: Demo evidence representing the second project question.
